log: ══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Astral Elf — Armored Escapist --- HP: 59/59 | AC: 20
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 15 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:19+4=23 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Astral Elf — Armored Escapist (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Astral Elf — Armored Escapist
→ Bite: [d20:17+10=27 vs AC 20] HIT! 17 damage. Astral Elf — Armored Escapist HP: 42/59
→ Bite: [d20:8+10=18 vs AC 20] MISS.
→ Bite: [d20:9+10=19 vs AC 20] MISS.
══ ROUND 2 ══
--- Astral Elf — Armored Escapist --- HP: 42/59 | AC: 20
REASONING: No concentration. Hold Person on Young Red Dragon (paralyzed = auto-crit in melee).
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 2 remaining). DC 15 WIS save on Young Red Dragon.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:6+4=10 vs DC 15] FAIL!
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18 | Cond: [paralyzed]
** INCAPACITATED ** Cannot take actions.
END OF TURN: WIS save vs Hold Person [d20:9+4=13 vs DC 15] FAIL. Still paralyzed.
══ ROUND 3 ══
--- Astral Elf — Armored Escapist --- HP: 42/59 | AC: 20 | Conc: Hold Person
REASONING: All 1 enemies disabled by Hold Person. Dodging to maintain concentration.
ACTION: Dodge. Attacks against have disadvantage.
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18 | Cond: [paralyzed]
** INCAPACITATED ** Cannot take actions.
END OF TURN: WIS save vs Hold Person [d20:15+4=19 vs DC 15] SUCCESS! No longer paralyzed!
